wiki.summary: On “STAY HERE 4 LIFE,” A$AP Rocky reworks Brent Faiyaz’s August 2025 single, “full moon.” On the song, Rocky and Brent reflect on wanting to remain in a perfect moment with someone they love, emphasizing intimacy, shared time, and envisioning a future together while keeping their respective relationships private and protected from the outside world. “full moon.” – and by extension this song – sample Ken Carson’s July 2024 track, “mewtwo.” Read more on Last.fm.
